overview: A beautiful, romantic birthday surprise page for Vaishu featuring a live countdown to May 8, 2026, a photo gallery with real personal photos, and a heartfelt birthday letter — all wrapped in a warm pink, rose, and gold aesthetic.
features: Full-screen hero with Happy Birthday message and animated decorations
Live countdown timer to May 8 2026 updating every second
Photo gallery with 4 real personal photos and lightbox viewer
Heartfelt birthday letter in elegant, warm styling
Pink/rose/gold color palette with soft animations throughout
